mapper.select:
SELECT p.project_id AS projectId, p.project_name AS projectName, u.nick_name AS projectManagerName, p.estimated_workload AS estimatedWorkload, p.adjust_workload AS adjustWorkload, d2.project_stage AS projectStage, ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(d2.work_hours), 0) / 8, 2) AS stageDays FROM pm_project p LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON u.user_id = p.project_manager_id AND u.del_flag = '0' LEFT JOIN sys_dept d ON CAST(p.project_dept AS CHAR) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = CAST(d.dept_id AS CHAR) LEFT JOIN sys_user u_create ON p.create_by COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = u_create.user_name LEFT JOIN pm_daily_report_detail d2 ON d2.project_id = p.project_id AND d2.del_flag = '0' LEFT JOIN pm_daily_report r ON r.report_id = d2.report_id AND r.del_flag = '0' WHERE p.del_flag = '0' AND p.project_id IN ( SELECT paged.project_id FROM ( SELECT p2.project_id FROM pm_project p2 LEFT JOIN sys_dept d3 ON CAST(p2.project_dept AS CHAR) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = CAST(d3.dept_id AS CHAR) LEFT JOIN sys_user u3 ON p2.create_by COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = u3.user_name WHERE p2.del_flag = '0'
AND p2.project_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.projectName}, '%')
${query.params.dataScope} ORDER BY p2.project_id LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize} ) paged ) GROUP BY p.project_id, p.project_name, u.nick_name, p.estimated_workload, p.adjust_workload, d2.project_stage ORDER BY p.project_id, d2.project_stage
mapper.update: UPDATE pm_project SET adjust_workload = #{adjustWorkload}, update_time = NOW() WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND del_flag = '0'
mapper.select:
SELECT DISTINCT project_id AS projectId, project_name AS projectName FROM pm_project WHERE del_flag = '0'
AND project_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY project_name LIMIT 20
